name: example-fs-emerald-editorial
title: Emerald Editorial
description: Magazine-cover business decks: a saturated emerald #3CD896 canvas, deep navy #0F1A5C ink, warm paper #F1E9D6 tiles, double-rule masthead ornaments, and Bodoni Moda weight-900 display serif on a fixed 1920x1080 stage with uniform viewport scaling. Mixed emerald/navy scheme, 8-slide editorial rhythm. Based on zarazhangrui/beautiful-html-templates emerald-editorial.

description_i18n.en: Magazine-cover business decks: a saturated emerald #3CD896 canvas, deep navy #0F1A5C ink, warm paper #F1E9D6 tiles, double-rule masthead ornaments, and Bodoni Moda weight-900 display serif on a fixed 1920x1080 stage with uniform viewport scaling. Mixed emerald/navy scheme, 8-slide editorial rhythm. Based on zarazhangrui/beautiful-html-templates emerald-editorial.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 杂志封面级商务刊幻灯片：祖母绿 #3CD896 画布 + 海军蓝 #0F1A5C 油墨 + 纸色 #F1E9D6 暖纸瓦片，双线 masthead 刊头装饰与 Bodoni Moda 900 粗显示衬线，固定 1920x1080 舞台等比缩放，mixed 绿/蓝混合 scheme 的 8 页编辑部节奏。Based on zarazhangrui/beautiful-html-templates emerald-editorial。

query.en: Create an Emerald Editorial {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} ({{slideCount}}): a magazine-cover business deck in the locked emerald-editorial design system. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies (all CSS and JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries, no remote images; Google Fonts links for Bodoni Moda + Manrope are the only allowed external references). Start from this plugin's example.html seed and keep its design system verbatim - keep the :root tokens, all slide-master CSS, the <deck-stage> element, and the entire inlined deck-stage runtime script untouched; replace only the text content, numbers, and labels inside the eight <section class="slide"> masters. Hard rules, all locked: (1) Fixed 16:9 stage - every slide is authored at exactly 1920x1080px inside <deck-stage width="1920" height="1080" no-rail>; the runtime scales the whole canvas uniformly to the viewport with one transform (factor = min(innerWidth/1920, innerHeight/1080), centered with letterbox) and re-runs on resize; never reflow content per device and never add responsive breakpoints inside slides. (2) The runtime provides keyboard navigation (arrows, Space, PageUp/PageDown, Home/End, number keys), click/tap zones, #<n> hash deep-linking with hash kept in sync, print-to-PDF one page per slide, and prefers-reduced-motion-safe behavior - do not rewrite or trim it. (3) Palette is exactly the token triad: emerald --bg #3CD896 (default slide canvas, plus reserved --bg-2 #2DC684 / --bg-3 #25B377), navy --ink #0F1A5C (text, rules, inverse panels, plus reserved --ink-2 #1B2774 / --ink-3 #3A4593), paper --paper #F1E9D6 (alternate tile fill), --rule rgba(15,26,92,0.22) for chart grid lines and --rule-strong rgba(15,26,92,0.85); never introduce a fourth color family. (4) Typography is exactly two faces: Bodoni Moda for every display moment (weight 900 default with -0.01em to -0.03em tracking and 0.9-0.95 line-height; 800 for ornament words and tile titles; 700 for small prepositions only) and Manrope for body (weight 500, 24-28px) and chrome (weight 700-800, ALWAYS uppercase with 0.05-0.18em letter-spacing); never use Bodoni at body scale, Manrope at display scale, or any third typeface. (5) Signature devices stay: the bilateral double-rule ornament (two stacked 4px ink rules on each side of a centered serif word - the 'The X of Y' playbill framing) on cover, statement, and closing; masthead and footline label rows; 4px solid ink structural rules everywhere (5px only on cover ornaments, 2px only for chart grid lines); inverse navy tiles with emerald text alternating with paper tiles; jumbo Bodoni numerals (460px) only on inverse navy panels. (6) Flat printed-ink depth only: zero border-radius, zero box-shadow, zero gradient, zero blur; elevation is color-block inversion plus 4px rules. (7) Keep the eight-master mixed scheme and rhythm: 01 centered cover with double-rule ornament + masthead/footline, 02 agenda with 200px title and ruled three-column rows, 03 split section opener (navy panel with 460px numeral | emerald headline + lede + mark pills), 04 centered 130px statement with ornament row + three supporting cells over a top rule, 05 data study (navy chart card with CSS bar chart on emerald/paper bars + takeaway side panel with two big stats), 06 four-step process flow of alternating navy/paper steps, 07 KPI grid of four alternating tiles with 144px figures and delta pills, 08 centered closing echoing the cover with a three-column footer. Scale slide count by repeating masters 03-07 per section, never by inventing new layouts. (8) Charts are pure CSS/HTML (height-percentage bars on the navy chart card); icons, if any, are inline SVG in the ink/emerald palette; no Chart.js, no mermaid, no external images. (9) No scrolling, no overflow, no overlapping text; split content into more slides instead of shrinking type below the seed's scale. Replace content only - never the design.
query.zh-CN: 用 Emerald Editorial（祖母绿封面故事）把 {{topic}} 做成给 {{audience}} 的 {{deckType}}（{{slideCount}}）：杂志封面级商务刊风格的零依赖单文件 HTML 幻灯片。从插件内 example.html 种子出发，原样保留 :root token、八个母版 CSS、<deck-stage> 与内联 deck-stage 运行时（固定 1920x1080 舞台等比缩放、键盘导航、hash 深链、打印导出），只替换文字与数字内容。锁定规格：祖母绿 #3CD896 + 海军蓝 #0F1A5C + 纸色 #F1E9D6 三色，Bodoni Moda 900 显示衬线 + Manrope 全大写 chrome，双线刊头装饰、4px 油墨横线、零圆角零阴影零渐变，mixed scheme 八母版节奏（封面/目录/分节开篇/陈述页/图表页/流程页/KPI 页/结尾）。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。
